## Problem

_What situation are you in where the current library falls short. Concrete beats abstract — one real scenario is more useful than a general principle._

## What you would do with it

_If this feature existed, what code would you write? Paste pseudocode or an API sketch if you have one._

```python
# Sketch of the API you wish existed
```

## Alternatives you considered

_What workarounds exist today, and why are they not enough._

## Scope check

- [ ] This protects the person downstream when the AI is wrong (library design principle — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Works across agent frameworks, or is clearly framework-specific
- [ ] Does not require adding a dependency to `cognilateral_trust.core`
